title: An Alternative Trajectory for Generative AI
main_contribution: Proposal of 'societies of DSS models' as an alternative to scaling large language models
key_problems_identified: High computational and energy costs of training and deploying large foundation models
Limited robust, compositional reasoning capabilities of large models
Data quality issues in Internet-scale text corpora
proposed_solution: Dynamic ecosystems where orchestration agents route tasks to distinct DSS back-ends
benefits: Enabling intelligence to migrate to secure, on-device experts
Moving generative AI away from environmental liability to sustainable force
Enabling small language models to master complex domain-specific reasoning
methodology: Using knowledge graphs, ontologies, and formal logic to form the basis for generation of synthetic curricula
